title: YTPMV: Dr. Octagonapus
description:
MP3: http://www.badongo.com/file/8737587

2 million views? Oh lordy.

All credit goes to DominicFear who made the Lazer Collection series. Party on, dude.

January 19th, 2009. 1 year since I first uploaded it, and it has approximately 825,000 views. Thanks guys, for making this the most viewed (explicitly titled) YTPMV. And yes, I know that the beat doesn't match all the time.

WAV (for whatever reason): http://www.mediafire.com/?9mjaiotoobj

Funny picture: http://img227.imageshack.us/img227/7303/droctaeconfi0.png

This is a poop on THE LAZER COLLECTION 2 by DominicFear. I'm really surprised at how popular this became. My thanks to all my viewers.

I made this fairly quickly, about a day.

The background music is Someday by Sugar Ray. In retrospect, the beat didn't match up as well as I wanted it to. Oh well.

The song at the beginning is "Hell Above the Water" by Curve.

#75 - Top Favorites (Today) - Music
